name: (RESCRIPT) Sonic Boom S1, EP 50 "Cabin Fever"
description:
This is a complete remake of my most popular bot of the same concept. While the old version is more of a legacy thing, this is meant to be a full-fledged bot. First attempt at something big now that I have some experience and... holy shit I was unaware of how restrictive the old place was. Like not even 500 tokens? Holy shit.

Regardless, this is the stated episode above, but with you self-inserted in.

For basics, let's assume one of three things. Either you're acquainted with Sonic and co and were hanging out when the storm hit, you're a friend that got caught in the storm and was happening near Amy's house, or you're a stranger desperate for shelter. All will have intro messages.
creator: Ulti-Wolf
